sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 엔비디아는 3분기 매출 570억 달러를 기록하며 데이터센터 부문의 강력한 성장에 힘입어 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출 570억 달러를 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 62% 성장하는 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.
데이터센터 부문 매출이 512억 달러를 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 66% 급증하는 등 AI 인프라 수요가 지속되고 있습니다.
회계연도 2026년 첫 9개월 동안 자사주 매입 및 현금 배당을 통해 총 370억 달러를 주주에게 환원했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 블랙웰(Blackwell) 제품의 판매가 급증하고 있으며 클라우드 GPU 공급이 매진되는 등 강력한 AI 컴퓨팅 수요가 확인되었습니다.
OpenAI와 전략적 파트너십을 체결하여 차세대 AI 인프라 구축을 위해 10기가와트 규모의 엔비디아 시스템을 배치하기로 했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 GAAP 매출 총이익률은 73.4%, 비GAAP 매출 총이익률은 73.6%를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 블랙웰 제품의 생산 및 공급 확대 속도가 향후 분기 매출 성장세에 미칠 영향 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q3fy26pr.htm EX-99.1 Document NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 • Record revenue of $57.0 billion, up 22% from Q2 and up 62% from a year ago • Record Data Center revenue of $51.2 billion, up 25% from Q2 and up 66% from a year ago SANTA CLARA, Calif.—Nov. 19, 2025― NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) today reported record revenue for the third quarter ended October 26, 2025, of $57.0 billion, up 22% from the previous quarter and up 62% from a year ago. For the quarter, GAAP and non-GAAP gross margins were 73.4% and 73.6%, respectively. For the quarter, GAAP and non-GAAP earnings per diluted share were both $1.30. “Blackwell sales are off the charts, and cloud GPUs are sold out,” said Jensen Huang, founder and CEO of NVIDIA. “Compute demand keeps accelerating and compounding across training and inference — each growing exponentially. We  Normalized numeric aliases: $57.0 billion = 570억 달러; $51.2 billion = 512억 달러; $57.0 = 57.0달러; $51.2 = 51.2달러; $1.30 = 1.30달러.

cle of AI. The AI ecosystem is scaling fast — with more new foundation model makers, more AI startups, across more industries, and in more countries. AI is going everywhere, doing everything, all at once.” During the first nine months of fiscal 2026, NVIDIA returned $37.0 billion to shareholders in the form of shares repurchased and cash dividends. As of the end of the third quarter, the company had $62.2 billion remaining under its share repurchase authorization. e are expected to be an income of approximately $500 million, excluding gains and losses from non-marketable and publicly-held equity securities. • GAAP and non-GAAP tax rates are expected to be 17.0%, plus or minus 1%, excluding any discrete items. Highlights Data Center • Third-quarter revenue was a record $51.2 billion, up 25% from the previous quarter and up 66% from a year ago. • Revealed that NVIDIA Blackwell achieved the highest performance and best overall efficiency in the SemiAnalysis InferenceMAX benchmarks, while delivering 10x throughput per megawatt compared with the previous generation. • Announced a strategic partnership with OpenAI to deploy at least 10 gigawatts of NVIDIA systems for OpenAI’s next-generation AI infrastructure. • Partnered with industry leaders, including Google Cloud, Microsoft, Oracle and xAI, to build America’s AI infrastructure with hundreds of  Normalized numeric aliases: $500 million = 5억 달러; $51.2 billion = 512억 달러; $500 = 500달러; $51.2 = 51.2달러.
